name: Gift Box
recipeIngredient: 1 package Entenmann's All Butter pound loaf (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8x4 inches loaf pan with wax paper.
2. Cut a rounded top off the cake; reserve for snacking or another use.
3. Trim the edges of the cake.
4. Cut the cake horizontally into 5 slices.
5. Place 3 cake slices at the bottom of the pan and cut another slice crosswise in half to cover the short sides.
6. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese with 1/2 cup cold milk using an electric mixer on low speed until smooth.
7. Add the remaining milk, pudding mix, and lemon peel; beat for 1-2 minutes or until well blended.
8. Gently stir in 1 cup whipped topping and orange segments.
9. Spoon the filling into the cake-lined pan.
10. Cover with the remaining cake slice.
11. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
12. Invert the pan onto a serving plate; remove wax paper.
13. Frost the top and sides of the cake with the remaining whipped topping.
14. Decorate with snack rolls to form a ribbon.
15. Garnish with cherries.
